title: poa pulviniformis
intro: Poa pulviniformis, also known as bent grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa pulviniformis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune system function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
